decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: plan_set_components (array of 12 components), engineering_integration_confirmed=true, conflicts_resolved=true, client_signoff_milestone='M3 — Construction Documents Delivered'. Schema check: rubric requires plan_set_components to contain cross_sections, full_plan_book, technical_coordination — these are present in the array as named components ('Architectural plans — floor plans all levels, sections (minimum 2)...', MEP drawings, technical specifications). Completeness 5: all required components present — cross sections (included in 'Architectural plans' component with 'sections minimum 2'), full plan book (12-component array covers all engineering inputs from Emilio's package), technical coordination layer (MEP coordination drawings, solar, smart home, irrigation all integrated), HOA approval stamp included (hoa_approval_stamp_included=true). Accuracy 5: no unresolved conflicts (conflicts_resolved=true); all 7 systems from engineering-package.json integrated and confirmed. Clarity 4 (not 5): package is largely self-contained; however, plan_set_components is a list of component descriptions (not a document set with page counts or drawing numbers) — one external reference exists (notes reference 'engineering-package.json' for the 7 systems). Not a critical gap but prevents score 5. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: executive plans produced after budget alignment approval (DG-09 at 2026-08-26) and before Ofelia begins bidding (DG-10 fires 2026-10-07). Decision readiness 5: Marcela can approve and hand off to Ofelia immediately. No auto-fail conditions triggered — cross sections present, no unresolved conflicts, all required system drawings present.
celia_routing_notes: Celia routing for DG-10 scored separately in segment-H-celia-routing-DG10-scorecard.json.
